.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(43, 42, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.canvas-node-content.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(25, 24, 27) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(50, 9, 144) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(50, 9, 144) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgb(50, 9, 144) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(43, 42, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(30, 29, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(30, 29, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(43, 42, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(43, 42, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(50, 9, 144) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(43, 42, 45) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(186, 159, 249) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(10, 10, 11) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(95, 58, 84) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(15, 15, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
